title: Korbond Hook & Loop Stick & Stick Black 50cm - 110116
features: With over 60 years of trading, Korbond is the UK’s no. 1 trusted brand of sewing, crafting & clothes care tools and accessories
Pack Contains: x 1 50cm Hook Tape & x 1 50cm Loop Tape
Ideal for use on hard surfaces around the home. It can also be used on soft furnishings in conjunction with iron on or sew on hook and loop
Allows for easy and long-lasting application
The Korbond Range of Hook & Loop features 7 variations of Iron On, Stick On, Sew On and Combination packs as well as handy Hook & Loop Dots all in black or white options
description: From the manufacturer Korbond Hook & Loop Korbond Hook & Loop range is a complete collection of alternative fastenings. Quick and versatile, Hook and Loop allows application to a wide range of home furnishings, solid materials and general craft projects. Complete Range Korbond's range of Hook & Loop covers every fastening type, from fabric to fabric bonding, to bonding two solid surfaces. Not just for the experienced crafter who can sew on Hook & Loop with ease, Korbond's Stick On and Iron On variations ensure the range is inclusive to all abilities. Attach cushions to a bench, or create quick closures in hand crafted Halloween costumes. Secure Fastenings Korbond's expertly designed Hook & Loop ensures strong and secure but temporary fastenings, ensuring the Hook & Loop only separates when physically removed. 50cm White Hook & Loop 50cm White Hook & Loop 50cm White Hook & Loop 50cm White Hook & Loop Handy Dots Hook & Loop Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 3.6 out of 5 stars 22 4.5 out of 5 stars 20 4.3 out of 5 stars 264 3.9 out of 5 stars 34 4.0 out of 5 stars 13 Price — no data £1.70 £ 1 . 70 £1.70 £ 1 . 70 £3.10 £ 3 . 10 £2.19 £ 2 . 19 Size 2cm x 50cm 2cm x 50cm 2cm x 50cm 2 cm x 50cm 12 Pairs Colour White White White White Black & White Surface Type Soft Surfaces Hard Surfaces Soft Surfaces Hard and Soft Surfaces Hard Surfaces Application Sew On Stick On Iron On Stick & Sew Stick On Ideal For Strong Fabric to Fabric Bonds Bonding two Hard Surfaces Strong Fabric to Fabric Bonds Bonding Soft Surfaces to Hard Surfaces Bonding two Hard Surfaces
